DEMURRER
Off Calendar Oct-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Roger L. Meredith, Esq. 616-5959 for pltf & opposing party; Richard Kahdeman, Esq. 818/597-9996 for deft & moving party Fleet Credit Card Services, Inc. (appearing via CourtCall).
RULING: Argued and the Court overruled deft's demurrer to the 1st cause of action for negligence and sustained with 10 days leave to amend the 2nd cause of action for unfair business practices. Pltf to prepare order. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

To Strike Plaintiffs Punitive Damages And Attorneys Fees Allegations
Off Calendar Oct-03-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Roger L. Meredith, Esq. 616-5959 for pltf & opposing party; Richard Kahdeman, Esq. 818/597-9996 for deft & moving party Fleet Credit Card Services, Inc. (appearing via CourtCall).
RULING: Argued and the Court granted deft's motion to strike as to punitive damages as to the 2nd and 4th causes of action and denied the motion to strike attorney fees as to the 4th cause of action. Pltf to prepare order. (302/AJR/RS) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling however pursuant to stipulation, complaint deemed amended on its face to assert violation of Song-Beverly Act CC1747 et. seq. Deft to prepare order. (AJR/CW)
